# Q5 regextract status, filter errors, count (regex log extraction)

**Dataset**: `gx_09_logs` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Regex extraction from free-text log fields with regextract. Q5 regextract status, filter errors, count. `split()` carves the delimited field into an array, `arrayindex()` picks an element (negative index = from the end); `regextract()` captures one RE2 group from a text field.

```sql
dataset = gx_09_logs | alter status = arrayindex(regextract(line, "status=(\d{3})"), 0) | filter status != "200" | comp count() as hits by status | sort desc hits
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 4). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
